title: MD
biography: Howard Florey was an Australian pathologist who developed penicillin into a practical antibiotic drug, saving countless lives in World War II and beyond. Nobel Prize 1945.
aiSummary: Howard Florey is a pathology specialist at University of Oxford. Based in Oxford.
